summary: Runtime progress can record control.amendment.* events with runtime_generation and amendment_id. Runtime protocol instructs executors to propose amendments instead of substituting readiness or compatibility evidence.
proof: Extended schemas/control-json/progress-event.schema.json with amendment and generation event types.
Updated .agents/skills/using-control-json/SKILL.md and runtime-control-json-protocol.md with reviewed replanning rules.
Updated control_json_runtime.py event validation for amendment_id and runtime_generation.
